model_evaluation_optimization.question: Why is model evaluation important in machine learning?
What is the purpose of a validation dataset?
What is a confusion matrix?
What is accuracy, and when can it be misleading?
What are precision and recall?
What is the F1 score?
What is ROC-AUC?
What is cross-validation?
What is hyperparameter tuning?
Why should machine learning models be evaluated on unseen data?
How would you choose the most appropriate evaluation metric for a machine learning problem?
Compare precision, recall, and F1 score. When would you prioritize each?
How does k-fold cross-validation improve model evaluation?
Compare Grid Search, Random Search, and Bayesian Optimization for hyperparameter tuning.
How would you determine whether a model is overfitting or underfitting?
Explain the purpose of regularization and compare L1 and L2 regularization.
What is early stopping, and how does it improve model training?
How would you evaluate a model trained on an imbalanced dataset?
How would you compare two machine learning models with similar performance?
Explain how threshold selection affects classification performance.
Design a complete model evaluation pipeline for a production machine learning system.
How would you determine whether an observed improvement in model performance is statistically significant?
Explain the trade-offs between maximizing accuracy, minimizing latency, and reducing infrastructure costs.
How would you optimize a machine learning model without increasing its complexity?
Describe strategies for improving model generalization without collecting additional training data.
How would you evaluate whether additional features genuinely improve model performance?
How would you determine the optimal probability threshold for a production classification model?
How would you compare multiple machine learning models while accounting for fairness, interpretability, and operational constraints?
Explain the trade-offs between offline evaluation metrics and real-world production performance.
Design an automated evaluation framework for continuously validating production machine learning models.
A fraud detection model achieves 99% accuracy but still misses many fraudulent transactions. Explain how you would investigate the problem.
A stakeholder wants to deploy a new model because it has a slightly higher validation accuracy. Walk me through the additional evaluations you would perform first.
Your model performs well during cross-validation but poorly after deployment. Describe your investigation process.
A teammate spends several days tuning hyperparameters but observes almost no improvement. Explain how you would evaluate whether hyperparameter tuning is the right focus.
Two machine learning models achieve nearly identical evaluation scores, but one is significantly more computationally expensive. Describe how you would decide which model to deploy.
A production model's performance gradually declines over several months despite passing all offline evaluation tests. Walk me through your investigation.
A customer requires both highly accurate predictions and explanations for every prediction. Explain how you would balance these competing requirements.
An engineer suggests optimizing only for validation accuracy when selecting the final model. How would you evaluate this proposal?
A newly deployed recommendation model increases click-through rate but decreases customer retention. Explain how you would evaluate the overall success of the deployment.

You're responsible for evaluating machine learning models used in autonomous systems where incorrect predictions have serious consequences. Describe your complete evaluation, validation, monitoring, and deployment strategy.
